MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Continued To Aug-24-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
GEORGE R. NEMIROFF, Esq., of WYNNE LAW FIRM, Tel:(415) 461-6400 for plaintiff.
Jason M. Julian, Esq., of JACKSON LEWIS P.C., Tel:(415) 394-9400 for Defendants and Cross-Plaintiffs BOWLERO CORP. and AMF BOWLING CENTERS, INC.
LUKE J. BICKEL, Esq., of SHEPPARD, MULLIN, RICHTER & HAMPTON LLP., Tel:858.720.8900 for Cross-Defendants VENTURA BLVD HOLDINGS, LLC,

Hearing Held. A timely Notice of Contest was received from Defendants and Cross-Plaintiff's counsel. Defendants/Cross-Plaintiff's contest the entirety of the Court's tentative ruling. During the hearing,Counsel Julian, represented that Plaintiff had file an amended complaint and that the filing fee was paid on September 18, 2025 a "Joint Stipulation to File Amended Complaint" has been filed, counsel for the Cross-Defendants were not included in the stipulation. The matter argued/discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANTs VENTURA INTERMEDIATE INC., VENTURA BLVD HOLDINGS INC., VENTURA BLVD SUPER HOLDINGS INC.,and VENTURA BLVD. ENTERTAINMENT, L.L.C.'s MOTION TO DISMISS is taken under submision.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***An ORDER GRANTING CROSS-DEFENDANTS VENTURA BLVD. ENTERTAINMENT, L.L.C., VENTURA BLVD HOLDINGS INC., VENTURA BLVD SUPER HOLDINGS INC., AND VENTURA INTERMEDIATE INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FORUM NON CONVENIENS was signed after the hearing***
